entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor, the host crop affected by ergot pathogens

entities.name: CLAVICEPS SORGHI
entities.description: A species of fungus that causes sorghum ergot

entities.name: CLAVICEPS AFRICANA
entities.description: A species of fungus that causes sorghum ergot

entities.name: CLAVICEPS SORGHICOLA
entities.description: A species of fungus that causes sorghum ergot

entities.name: SORGHUM ERGOT PATHOGEN
entities.description: Fungi that infect sorghum ovaries and produce sclerotia

entities.name: SCLEROTIA
entities.description: Hard textured resting structures used by ergot pathogens to survive between harvests

entities.name: VIABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of sclerotia to remain alive and capable of causing infection over time

entities.name: VARIABILITY
entities.description: The degree of difference in characteristics among sclerotia

entities.name: INFECTION
entities.description: The process of the pathogen invading the host crop

entities.name: SPHACELIA
entities.description: Spore bearing masses that develop from infected ovaries in sorghum panicles

entities.name: ASCOSPORES
entities.description: Spores produced by asci from germinating sclerotia that infect new crops
